title: About being killed when using yosys synthesis

features.name: large 3D unpacked array for multiplication results
features.description: Code should include a large 3-dimensional unpacked array used for storing multiplication results with dimensions exceeding 1000 total elements

features.name: wide memory array with large depth
features.description: Code should include a memory array with data width exceeding 100 bits and depth exceeding 256 locations

features.name: large 2D unpacked array for accumulation
features.description: Code should include a 2-dimensional unpacked array with over 100 elements for storing accumulation results

features.name: 3D unpacked array for convolution buffer
features.description: Code should include a 3-dimensional unpacked array used as a shift buffer for convolution operations

features.name: unpacked array of wide interface wires
features.description: Code should include unpacked arrays of wide wires (over 100 bits width) used for streaming data
